is a key partitioning field for the CCW data files. To be included 
in a RIF, each claim must have a SRVC_END_DT; therefore, this value is never missing. If this date is 
missing from the source files, we derive the value. We include a variable (called the service end date 
code SRVC_END_DT_CD) to identify when and how the date was imputed.
